request: How do I submit a claim?
response: Fill in the claim form, attach your bill, and send it through the member portal. You will get an answer within two weeks.

request: How do I order a new ID card?
response: Log in to the portal, click on ID cards, and order a new one. It ships free within five days.

response: The plan year starts in January and ends in December. Simple as that.
